actions.value:
Edge does NOT process any exchanges ourselves, but if you can identify the exchange partner that was used and locate the order ID, then I will be happy to help you reach out to them directly. 

 

If this was a purchase or sell of cryptocurrency, then you will have received an email from the exchange service. This email includes the specific order information as well as a way to check the status and contact the exchange if you have any questions or concerns. 

 

If this was a swap between two cryptocurrencies, then you can find the transaction/order information by tapping on the transaction from within the wallet sending the funds.
